non_compliance_flags.message: GFCI not required for this layout per NEC 210.8 (verify with AHJ if any receptacle within 6 ft of a sink during tenant fit-out).

assumptions: Selectivity verification deferred — fault-level intent absent and engineer Ifault not declared per WI3.
Cable ampacity check assumes NEC Table 310.16 (THWN-2 in conduit, 30°C ambient).

rationale.chat_summary: 200A 120/240V split-phase NEMA Type 1 panelboard for a US retail tenant fit-out. 4 circuits sized per NEC Table 310.16 (12 AWG / 10 AWG / 10 AWG / 6 AWG). GFCI not required for this back-of-house layout. Selectivity deferred (tool_call_pending) until fault-level skill ships. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add tenant kitchen'.

sections.title: Board Classification
sections.summary: US NEMA Type 1 panelboard, 200A, 24-way. Per NEC Article 408 — maximum 42 overcurrent devices per panelboard section (well within limit).

decisions.label: NEMA Type 1 enclosure
decisions.summary: Indoor general purpose; suitable for retail service room.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 240V single-phase split (120/240V three-wire), 200A main breaker. POCO-declared Ze 0.20Ω.

decisions.label: 200A main breaker
decisions.summary: Standard US single-phase split-phase service rating for small retail.

sections.title: Busbar Sizing
sections.summary: 200A busbar matches main rating, IcW 10 kA. Sum 71A diversified to 57A — 200A busbar has 70% headroom for expansion.

decisions.label: 200A busbar IcW 10 kA
decisions.summary: Sized to match main breaker rating.

sections.title: Way Assignment
sections.summary: 5 ways used (3 × single-pole MCBs W1-W3, 1 × 2-pole MCCB W4-W5), 19 ways spare.

sections.title: OCPD Selection
sections.summary: Branch circuits sized per NEC 240. C01/C02 (20A) on 12 AWG (25A ampacity). C03 (30A) on 10 AWG (35A). C04 (60A RTU) on 6 AWG (65A). All In ≤ Iz pass per NEC Table 310.16.

decisions.label: Thermal-magnetic MCBs/MCCB per NEC 240
decisions.summary: Standard US OCPD types for branch circuits.

sections.title: RCD Strategy
sections.summary: GFCI not required for this back-of-house retail layout per NEC 210.8. AFCI per NEC 210.12 applies to dwelling-unit branch circuits — not this retail fit-out.

sections.title: Cable Selection
sections.summary: THWN-2 copper conductors in EMT conduit. NEC Table 310.16 ampacities at 30°C ambient.

sections.title: Selectivity Verification
sections.summary: 4 cascade pairs (MAIN → C01..C04) emitted as tool_call_pending. fault-level intent absent; engineer Ifault not declared. Will re-emit once fault-level skill ships.

decisions.label: All cascades tool_call_pending
decisions.rule: NEC 240.4 protection of conductors + 240.86 series ratings

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One INFO flag for AHJ GFCI verification + one TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for deferred selectivity.
